# Fleet-presence 3D assets

`models/office.glb` and `models/character.glb` are from **The Delegation** by arturitu
(https://github.com/arturitu/the-delegation).

- **Code** in that project is MIT. We do not vendor its code — only the two 3D assets, loaded
  natively in BhatBot's own WebGL Three.js scene (`src/presence.html`).
- **3D assets** are licensed **CC BY-NC 4.0** (Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial).
  Use here is personal/non-commercial (Siddhant's own assistant). If BhatBot is ever distributed
  or used commercially, these assets must be replaced or separately licensed from the author.
